synopsis:
On Shalyvane, Luke Skywalker, Chewbacca, and the Em'liy G'hinji face the image of Darth Vader, only to realize it is a holographic recording. Vader reveals that the late Rebel pilot Shira Brie was in fact an Imperial spy before the emitter explodes. Unwilling to take the claim on faith, Luke and Chewbacca set out for the databank vault on Krake's Planet.

Aboard the *Executor*, Vader meets with Admiral Mils Giel, who recently failed to secure the Teezl. Respecting Giel's integrity, Vader spares his life but demotes him to lieutenant. Meanwhile, Luke and Chewbacca infiltrate the Krake Data Vault, a facility built from the mass of a giant Mind Spider. Luke tricks an Imperial officer into downloading records and confirms Vader spoke the truth: Shira was born on Coruscant and genetically raised to be a perfect spy, personally selected by Vader to infiltrate the Alliance. Crushed but somewhat consoled that the Force had not betrayed him after all, Luke fights off a squad of stormtroopers and escapes with Chewbacca, who destroys the outpost with the *Millennium Falcon*'s deflector screens. Deep within the *Executor*, Shira Brie's barely-alive body floats in a bacta tank.
title: Star Wars (1977) #63: The Mind Spider
